name: Elastic Email API
what_it_does: Affordable email delivery platform with REST API and SMTP relay — supporting transactional and bulk email sending with pay-per-email pricing, contact management, templates, and campaign management via comprehensive API.
use_cases: Sending transactional emails via REST API or SMTP at low per-email cost
Running email marketing campaigns to subscriber lists via Campaigns API
Managing contacts and lists programmatically with tag-based segmentation
Sending template-based emails with dynamic variable substitution
Tracking email delivery, opens, and clicks via webhook or reporting API
not_for: Advanced behavioral automation (use Customer.io or Klaviyo)
Teams needing enterprise deliverability guarantees with dedicated IPs and warm-up support
Complex marketing automation beyond simple campaign sending
best_when: A developer or small business needs affordable pay-per-email sending with combined transactional and marketing capabilities via a single API.
avoid_when: You need advanced marketing automation, enterprise deliverability, or sophisticated segmentation beyond basic list management.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. X-ElasticEmail-ApiKey header. Account-scoped access. No fine-grained scopes. Separate SMTP credentials for relay. Single API key per account.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-email from $0.09/1,000 emails; Unlimited plans from $15/month
pricing.notes: Very affordable pay-per-use pricing. Canadian company. No credit card for free tier. Good for low-volume or variable volume senders. Unlimited plans for higher volume. Not a premium deliverability provider but reliable for most use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per second/minute by plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Comprehensive REST API covering emails, contacts, campaigns, templates, and statistics. SDKs for 6 languages. Webhook support for email events. API v4 is current. Good documentation with OpenAPI spec. Some endpoints have complex parameter interactions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Email sends create new messages — use message ID for tracking. Contact operations upsert by email — idempotent. Template management idempotent. Campaign creation creates new campaign records.
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier limited to 100 emails/day — insufficient for testing burst scenarios
Deliverability reputation lower than premium providers (Postmark, Mailgun)
API v2 and v4 both available — use v4; v2 is legacy

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. API key header auth. Domain verification prevents abuse. No formal certifications beyond GDPR. Canadian company. Standard email security practices.
